description: Vegeta's sudden arrival creates an opening for the others to rescue Goku. While Yamcha rushes the fallen hero to safety, Vegeta reveals his new and improved fighting style - including the Big Bang Attack!

input: No Victory for Android 19! Enter Super Vegeta!
Victory for Android 19! Enter Super Vegeta!

title: No Victory for Android 19! Enter Super Vegeta!

description: While Kami considers merging with Piccolo, Trunks and the others discover a second time machine. Elsewhere, Vegeta vows to become strong enough to defeat the Android invaders!

input: Another Time Machine! Bulma Uncovers a Mystery!
Time Machine! Bulma Uncovers a Mystery!

title: Another Time Machine! Bulma Uncovers a Mystery!

description: The Super Namekian formerly known as Piccolo finds himself face-to-face with the most terrifying monster the world has ever seen. Who is this new threat? And why does he have Goku's power?

input: I Am Your Brother! The Monster with Goku's Energy!
Am Your Brother! The Monster with Goku's Energy!
Your Brother! The Monster with Goku's Energy!
Brother! The Monster with Goku's Energy!

title: I Am Your Brother! The Monster with Goku's Energy!

description: The newly activated Androids 17 and 18 provide a display of their unprecedented power and cruelty. Vegeta is eager to fight, but he soon finds himself outnumbered three to one!

input: Number 17 and Number 18! The Androids Awaken!

title: Number 17 and Number 18! The Androids Awaken!

description: Cell continues his bloodthirsty rampage, Krillin and Trunks destroy what little remains of Dr. Gero's laboratory, and Goku awakens from his extended slumber ready to fight!

input: The Hunt for Cell is On! Goku, Back in Action!
Hunt for Cell is On! Goku, Back in Action!
for Cell is On! Goku, Back in Action!
Cell is On! Goku, Back in Action!
is On! Goku, Back in Action!

title: The Hunt for Cell is On! Goku, Back in Action!

description: Frieza is defeated, Namek has been obliterated, and the whereabouts of Goku remain a mystery. How will Earth carry on without its Super Saiyan hero? And what will become of the Namekian refugees?

input: Goku Vanishes Into Space! Welcome Home, Super Warriors!
Vanishes Into Space! Welcome Home, Super Warriors!
Into Space! Welcome Home, Super Warriors!

title: Goku Vanishes Into Space! Welcome Home, Super Warriors!

description: Faced with an unbeatable enemy, Vegeta flies away in a solitary rage, and Piccolo seeks out Kami on a quest to increase his power by whatever means necessary!

input: The Time For Reunification Has Come! Piccolo's Unshakeable Resolve!
Time For Reunification Has Come! Piccolo's Unshakeable Resolve!
For Reunification Has Come! Piccolo's Unshakeable Resolve!
Reunification Has Come! Piccolo's Unshakeable Resolve!

title: The Time For Reunification Has Come! Piccolo's Unshakeable Resolve!

description: After Goku is seemingly defeated by Frieza, Gohan enters the fight to avenge the loss of his father. Meanwhile, a newly resurrected Dende rushes to make a final wish before planet Namek is destroyed.

input: Goku's Furious Roar! A Last-Minute Resurrection Wish!
Furious Roar! A Last-Minute Resurrection Wish!

title: Goku's Furious Roar! A Last-Minute Resurrection Wish!

description: One by one, Vegeta and his reluctant allies meet horrific ends at the hands of the unstoppable Androids. A bed-stricken Goku is Earth's only hope, but there's a specially-designed Android waiting to destroy him!

input: A Sweet Face and Super Power? Android 18 vs. Vegeta!
Sweet Face and Super Power? Android 18 vs. Vegeta!
Face and Super Power? Android 18 vs. Vegeta!
and Super Power? Android 18 vs. Vegeta!

title: A Sweet Face and Super Power? Android 18 vs. Vegeta!

description: Goku leads his Saiyan brethren to a secret room designed for highly-advanced training. Meanwhile, Piccolo puts his enhanced powers to the test against an Android adversary!

input: Break the Super Saiyan Barrier! Into the Hyperbolic Time Chamber!
the Super Saiyan Barrier! Into the Hyperbolic Time Chamber!
Super Saiyan Barrier! Into the Hyperbolic Time Chamber!
Saiyan Barrier! Into the Hyperbolic Time Chamber!
Barrier! Into the Hyperbolic Time Chamber!

title: Break the Super Saiyan Barrier! Into the Hyperbolic Time Chamber!

description: After defeating Piccolo, Cell turns his attention to his true prey: Androids 17 and 18. The monster must absorb them both to achieve his perfect form, but Android 16 still stands in his way!

input: Power Unknown! Android 16 Breaks His Silence!

title: Power Unknown! Android 16 Breaks His Silence!

description: Goku and Gohan continue their Super Saiyan training, and Trunks finds out the hard way that boosting his power to the next level won't stop Cell. The situation looks bleak until the monster throws down a challenge!

input: The Strongest Super Saiyan! Trunks' Power Unleashed!
Strongest Super Saiyan! Trunks' Power Unleashed!

title: The Strongest Super Saiyan! Trunks' Power Unleashed!

description: Vegeta unleashes an awesome attack that leaves Cell shorthanded, but the monster responds with a brutal beat down, knocking the Saiyan prince unconscious and clearing the way for Trunks to enter the fight!

input: Vegeta's Final Push! Defeat the Invincible Cell!
Final Push! Defeat the Invincible Cell!

title: Vegeta's Final Push! Defeat the Invincible Cell!

description: Cell - believing he has defeated Piccolo - foolishly reveals the mysteries of his hideous origins. Little does the monster know, the powerful Super Namekian cannot be conquered so easily!

input: The Dizzying Deception and the Daring Escape! Defeat the Android Cell!
Dizzying Deception and the Daring Escape! Defeat the Android Cell!
Deception and the Daring Escape! Defeat the Android Cell!
and the Daring Escape! Defeat the Android Cell!
the Daring Escape! Defeat the Android Cell!
Daring Escape! Defeat the Android Cell!

title: The Dizzying Deception and the Daring Escape! Defeat the Android Cell!

description: The bone-chilling onslaught of Frieza and King Cold is brought to a halt by a mysterious stranger with a mighty sword, but only time will tell if this new warrior is friend or foe!

input: I Will Defeat Frieza! Another Super Saiyan!
Will Defeat Frieza! Another Super Saiyan!

title: I Will Defeat Frieza! Another Super Saiyan!

description: Despite the danger of Namek's impending implosion, Goku continues his battle with Frieza, determined to extract revenge for Krillin's murder. Elsewhere, Gohan tries to locate Bulma before it's too late!

input: Avenge the Fallen, Goku! Countdown to the Planet's Destruction!
the Fallen, Goku! Countdown to the Planet's Destruction!
Fallen, Goku! Countdown to the Planet's Destruction!
Goku! Countdown to the Planet's Destruction!

title: Avenge the Fallen, Goku! Countdown to the Planet's Destruction!

description: The wreckage of Frieza's body is rebuilt by the monster's fiendish father! Together, they embark on a mission to eradicate life on Earth. Will Goku return home in time to save his friends?

input: There is Planet Earth, Father! Frieza and King Cold Strike Back!
is Planet Earth, Father! Frieza and King Cold Strike Back!
Planet Earth, Father! Frieza and King Cold Strike Back!
Earth, Father! Frieza and King Cold Strike Back!
Father! Frieza and King Cold Strike Back!
Frieza and King Cold Strike Back!

title: There is Planet Earth, Father! Frieza and King Cold Strike Back!

description: Goku tries to pulverize the Androids with a devastating display of his Super Saiyan strength, but a mysterious ailment prevents the mighty warrior from unleashing his true power!

input: The Unbeatable Enemy Within! Goku vs. Android 19!
Unbeatable Enemy Within! Goku vs. Android 19!

title: The Unbeatable Enemy Within! Goku vs. Android 19!

description: Goku tells the amazing story of how he survived the destruction of Namek, and the heroic warriors begin their training for a looming showdown with the Androids!

input: Goku's New Move, Instant Transmission! The Three-Year Training Session Begins!
New Move, Instant Transmission! The Three-Year Training Session Begins!
Move, Instant Transmission! The Three-Year Training Session Begins!
Instant Transmission! The Three-Year Training Session Begins!
Transmission! The Three-Year Training Session Begins!

title: Goku's New Move, Instant Transmission! The Three-Year Training Session Begins!

description: During their investigation of the second time machine, Gohan and company stumble upon the shell of what appears to be a monstrous creature. Later, a horrific vision forces Kami to accept his fate and merge with Piccolo!

input: The Monster Goes Into Motion! Strike of the Super Namekian!
Monster Goes Into Motion! Strike of the Super Namekian!
Goes Into Motion! Strike of the Super Namekian!
Into Motion! Strike of the Super Namekian!
Motion! Strike of the Super Namekian!

title: The Monster Goes Into Motion! Strike of the Super Namekian!

description: Kami and King Kai concoct a plan to restore the wish-granting power of the Namekian Dragon Balls, and Goku continues his epic battle with the villainous Frieza!

input: Full-Power Frieza! Shenron, Grant Our Wish!

title: Full-Power Frieza! Shenron, Grant Our Wish!

description: The army launches an all-out attack on Cell, but the puny Earthlings prove to be no match for the monster. In the aftermath of battle, Goku hatches a plan to revive the magic Dragon Balls!

input: The Truce is Broken! The Defense Force Strikes Back at Cell!
Truce is Broken! The Defense Force Strikes Back at Cell!
is Broken! The Defense Force Strikes Back at Cell!
Broken! The Defense Force Strikes Back at Cell!
The Defense Force Strikes Back at Cell!
Defense Force Strikes Back at Cell!

title: The Truce is Broken! The Defense Force Strikes Back at Cell!

description: Piccolo and Android 17 trade blows in a battle of unprecedented brutality! Cell - sensing their presence - races to the scene of the skirmish in pursuit of his terrifying perfect form!

input: The Super Namekian Powers Up! Piccolo vs. Android 17!
Super Namekian Powers Up! Piccolo vs. Android 17!
Namekian Powers Up! Piccolo vs. Android 17!

title: The Super Namekian Powers Up! Piccolo vs. Android 17!

description: The formidable stranger finally reveals the secret of his origins after a Super Saiyan sparring session with Goku. The oddly familiar fighter is a visitor from the future sent to deliver a grave warning!

input: Welcome Back, Goku! Confessions of the Mysterious Youth, Trunks!
Back, Goku! Confessions of the Mysterious Youth, Trunks!
Goku! Confessions of the Mysterious Youth, Trunks!
Confessions of the Mysterious Youth, Trunks!

title: Welcome Back, Goku! Confessions of the Mysterious Youth, Trunks!

description: Cell's arrival forces Piccolo and the Androids into an uneasy - and temporary - alliance. While the Super Namekian mounts a desperate, final attack, Goku and Gohan wait for Vegeta to emerge from the Room of Spirit and Time!
title: Run, Android 17! Piccolo's All-Or-Nothing Struggle!

description: Desperate to help Android 18 escape, Tien places his own life at risk in an unwinnable battle with the monster Cell. When the three-eyed warrior's power quickly fades, he'll need a lift from a friend to avoid a gruesome end!

input: Tien’s Desperate Attack! Save Your Friends, Goku!
Desperate Attack! Save Your Friends, Goku!

title: Tien’s Desperate Attack! Save Your Friends, Goku!

description: Goku wages a life and death battle with a deadly heart condition, Piccolo takes center stage in the battle to destroy Android 20, and Trunks returns from the future with a disturbing revelation.

input: Piccolo's Assault! Android 20 and the Twisted Future!
Assault! Android 20 and the Twisted Future!

title: Piccolo's Assault! Android 20 and the Twisted Future!

description: Cell announces his evil plan for an epic martial arts tournament. The strongest fighters in the world are welcome to compete, but if the monster wins - everybody dies!

input: Cell Invades the Airwaves! Announcing, "The Cell Games!"
Invades the Airwaves! Announcing, "The Cell Games!"

title: Cell Invades the Airwaves! Announcing, "The Cell Games!"

description: Goku and Gohan emerge from their training session with Super Saiyan hair and a strange sense of calm. Goku's newfound strength is out of this world, but he's not sure it will be enough to defeat Cell!

input: Training Complete! Goku Sizes Up the Competition!
Complete! Goku Sizes Up the Competition!

title: Training Complete! Goku Sizes Up the Competition!

description: Gohan struggles to achieve Super Saiyan status, Vegeta considers letting Cell attain his perfect form, and Krillin succumbs to his powerful feelings for a certain pretty Android!

input: Cell on the Verge Of Defeat! Krillin, Destroy Android 18!
on the Verge Of Defeat! Krillin, Destroy Android 18!
the Verge Of Defeat! Krillin, Destroy Android 18!
Verge Of Defeat! Krillin, Destroy Android 18!

title: Cell on the Verge Of Defeat! Krillin, Destroy Android 18!

description: Vegeta's unrivaled arrogance and Krillin's unusual affection for Androids help Cell move one step closer to his perfect form. Meanwhile, Gohan struggles to achieve Super Saiyan status!

input: The Battle Turns for the Worst! Cell Attacks Android 18!
Battle Turns for the Worst! Cell Attacks Android 18!
Turns for the Worst! Cell Attacks Android 18!
for the Worst! Cell Attacks Android 18!

title: The Battle Turns for the Worst! Cell Attacks Android 18!

description: Goku and his friends eagerly await the arrival of the Androids, but Yamcha's confrontation with the mechanized monsters suggests that Earth's heroes may be up against more muscle they can handle!
title: Undetectable Monsters! The Androids Appear!

description: While Gohan races to save Piccolo, Goku inflicts a Super-Saiyan beating on Frieza. The blonde brawler's impressive new powers drive his opponent to a desperate counterattack that could obliterate Namek!

input: The Angry Super Saiyan! Goku Throws Down the Gauntlet!
Angry Super Saiyan! Goku Throws Down the Gauntlet!
Super Saiyan! Goku Throws Down the Gauntlet!
Saiyan! Goku Throws Down the Gauntlet!

title: The Angry Super Saiyan! Goku Throws Down the Gauntlet!

description: Vegeta puts his new powers to the test in a shocking slugfest with Cell. Back in the Room of Spirit and Time, Goku attempts to teach Gohan the secret to a Super Saiyan transformation!

input: Beyond Super Saiyan! Vegeta Confronts the Monster Cell!
Super Saiyan! Vegeta Confronts the Monster Cell!
Saiyan! Vegeta Confronts the Monster Cell!

title: Beyond Super Saiyan! Vegeta Confronts the Monster Cell!

description: While Piccolo and company search for Dr. Gero's secret laboratory, Vegeta sets out to hunt down and destroy Android 20. Meanwhile, Trunks tries everything in his power to save his stubborn father!

input: The Hunt for Doctor Gero! Discover the Hidden Laboratory!
Hunt for Doctor Gero! Discover the Hidden Laboratory!
for Doctor Gero! Discover the Hidden Laboratory!
Doctor Gero! Discover the Hidden Laboratory!

title: The Hunt for Doctor Gero! Discover the Hidden Laboratory!

description: Gohan uses the pain of past failures to make a Super Saiyan breakthrough, and Vegeta is shocked to find he's no match for Cell's formidable perfect form!

input: The Tables Are Turned! Witness the Power of Perfection!
Tables Are Turned! Witness the Power of Perfection!
Are Turned! Witness the Power of Perfection!
Turned! Witness the Power of Perfection!

title: The Tables Are Turned! Witness the Power of Perfection!
